title.en: What next for England? How does Tuchel fix key problems for Euro 2028?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰的下一步是什么？ Tuchel如何解决2028年欧洲杯的关键问题？

summary.en: The manner of England's World Cup exit was meek, and Thomas Tuchel must now find a way to fix those problems as focus will soon turn to qualifying for Euro 2028.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰世界杯的退出方式是温和的，托马斯·图切尔现在必须找到一种方法来解决这些问题，因为焦点很快就会转向2028年欧洲杯的资格赛。

title.en: How coach-on-pitch Messi undid England's tactics on the fly
title.zh-CN: 球场上的教练梅西如何在飞行中解除英格兰的战术

summary.en: England pride themselves on their physicality, so shouldn't it have suited them to face a 39-year-old who spends most of his time walking? Not this 39-year-old. BBC Sport football tactics...
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰为自己的身体感到自豪，所以他们不应该面对一个39岁的人，他大部分时间都在散步？不是这位39岁的英国广播公司体育足球战术...

title.en: Romero labels Neville 'stupid' over criticism
title.zh-CN: 罗梅罗批评内维尔“愚蠢”

summary.en: Argentina defender Cristian Romero says player-turned-pundit Gary Neville was "stupid" to criticise his centre-back partnership with Lisandro Martinez.
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷后卫克里斯蒂安·罗梅罗（ Cristian Romero ）表示，球员出身的专家加里·内维尔（ Gary Neville ）批评他与利桑德罗·马丁内斯（ Lisandro Martinez ）的中后

title.en: 24m tune in to watch England-Argentina

summary.en: England's defeat to Argentina in the World Cup semi-final attracts an audience of 24 million on the BBC.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在世界杯半决赛中击败阿根廷队，在英国广播公司吸引了2400万观众。

title.en: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
title.zh-CN: “被动”和“崩溃” --图切尔的防御战术是否让英格兰付出了代价？

summary.en: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heartbreaking semi-final defeat. Did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost them a place in the World Cup final?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队以1比0击败阿根廷队，然后陷入令人心碎的半决赛失利。老板托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）的“消极”策略让他们在世界杯决赛中失去了一席之地吗？

title.en: Tuchel retains FA backing despite England defeat
title.zh-CN: 尽管英格兰队失利，图切尔仍然获得足总的支持

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel retains the backing of the Football Association despite England failing to reach the World Cup final.
summary.zh-CN: 尽管英格兰未能进入世界杯决赛，托马斯·图切尔仍然得到了足球协会的支持。

title.en: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷面临福克兰群岛旗帜的诉讼

summary.en: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the...
summary.zh-CN: 阿根廷的球员在庆祝世界杯半决赛战胜英格兰后，将面临国际足联的纪律处分，他们的旗帜支持他们的国家声称...

title.en: Why England's loss to Argentina felt like most painful in 60 years of hurt
title.zh-CN: 为什么英格兰输给阿根廷是60年来最痛苦的伤病

summary.en: England's years of hurt will now stretch beyond 60, but the late collapse to a World Cup semi-final defeat by Argentina may be the most painful wound of all.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队多年的伤病现在将延续到60岁之后，但阿根廷队在世界杯半决赛中的失利可能是最痛苦的伤口。

title.en: Kane unsure if he will play at next World Cup
title.zh-CN: 凯恩不确定他是否会参加下一届世界杯

summary.en: Harry Kane says it is "too early" to judge whether he could play on for England until the 2030 World Cup following the painful semi-final defeat by Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）表示，在阿根廷痛苦的半决赛失利之后，现在判断他是否可以为英格兰队效力到2030年世界杯还为时过早。

title.en: Prince William tells England to 'hold heads high'
title.zh-CN: 威廉王子告诉英格兰“高举头”

summary.en: The Prince of Wales says England has "inspired us all" as he offers his commiserations over the loss to Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 威尔士亲王表示，英格兰“激励了我们所有人” ，因为他对阿根廷的失利表示同情。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 39
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星39号

title.en: Was Tuchel to blame for England's mentality or just another victim of it?
title.zh-CN: 图切尔是英格兰心态的罪魁祸首，还是仅仅是另一个受害者？

summary.en: The same feeling, but worse. England exit the World Cup with a 2-1 defeat just as they did twice under Gareth Southgate and in strikingly similar fashion to that semi-final defeat to Croatia eight...
summary.zh-CN: 同样的感觉，但更糟。英格兰队以2比1的失利退出了世界杯，就像他们在加雷斯·索斯盖特（ Gareth Southgate ）的领导下两次失利一样，并且与半决赛击败克罗地亚8队的比赛方式惊人地相似……
